title: The Story of Tahir When He Marched to Reinforce Fayruz
description: Fayruz Abu Ja`far al -Tabari said: Abu Bakr had written to Tahir b. Abi Halah and to Masruq to go down to $an`a' and to assist the Abna'; so the two of them went out until they came to $an`a'. and he wrote [also] to `Abdallah b. Thawr b. Asghar'° 72 to gather

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 10
